message:
✨ Add Widget Settings section with Übersicht download (#541)

* 🐛 Fix Übersicht widget to use curl instead of fetch

Übersicht widgets run shell commands, not browser JavaScript.
Changed from async fetch() to curl shell command.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 📖 Add startup-oauth.sh instructions to CLAUDE.md

Document the recommended way to start the development environment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Restore 3D globe animation and fix Safari OAuth

- Restore Three.js 3D globe animation on login page
- Fix Safari OAuth CSRF issue by using server-side state storage
  instead of cookies (Safari blocks cookies in OAuth redirect flows)
- Remove viewer count tooltip from navbar

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Add Widget Settings section with Übersicht download

- New WidgetSettingsSection in Settings page
- Download/copy Übersicht widget with draggable behavior
- Widget preview showing sample cluster data
- Link to browser-based /widget page alternative
- Add TODO for token counter testing with predictions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
